历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 12550 → 12709 → 12860 → 15383 → 15422. From 2021 to 2023, it remained stable in the 12500–12900 range. In 2024, it dropped significantly by about 2500 places to 15383, and in 2025, it continued to drop slightly to 15422. Over the past two years, the cumulative drop is about 2560 places, indicating a notable increase in competition for this university in Hunan Province. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 72 in 2021 → 70 in 2022 → 66 in 2023 → 78 in 2024 → 79 in 2025, showing a trend of first decreasing then increasing. The 2026 plan is 83, an increase of 4 (about 5.1%) compared to 2025, which will push the ranking upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao shares the 985, 211, and Double First-Class status of Northeastern University. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, Northeastern University ranks 38th, with a stable range of 36–39 in recent years, indicating a high university level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus identity controversies, with no significant negative public opinion. The overall Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranking is 82nd (for the main campus of Northeastern University), rated as average, with moderate short video exposure. No records of enrollment gaps were found. It shares the discipline evaluations of Northeastern University: Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, and Metallurgical Engineering A, totaling 6 disciplines rated A- or above, which strongly attracts applicants to related engineering majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with the university's advantageous disciplines, driving up application enthusiasm for related majors. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. The university is located in Qinhuangdao City, Hebei Province (not within the province), and in 2025, it enrolled 91 students in Hunan, accounting for about 3.5% of the total national plan. As a branch campus, cross-provincial application enthusiasm is limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking drop trend in 2024–2025, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+4 students/+5.1%), the increase in Physics Category examinees in Hunan by about 8.4%, and the sustained high popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to drop slightly from the 2025 ranking of 15422. The predicted minimum ranking is about 15921, with a range of 15421–16421.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<15421), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors. If the ranking is near the upper limit (>16421), mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.
